scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.lint:report: npm run reports:prepare && npm run lint:report -w apps/api && npm run lint:report -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run reports:prepare && npm run test:coverage -w apps/api && npm run test:coverage -w apps/web
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e -w apps/api && npm run test:e2e -w apps/web
scripts.test:e2e:report: npm run reports:prepare && npm run test:e2e:report -w apps/web
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.reports: npm run lint:report && npm run test:coverage
